docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,389.84 FILED BY ALLEGRO CORP DBA AD SPECIALTIES UNLIMITED AS TO DEFENDANT PHOEBUS INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PHOEBUS INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEGRO CORP DBA AD SPECIALTIES UNLIMITED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHOEBUS INC $1,389.84 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,422.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PHOEBUS INC HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-1991 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-04-1991 AS TO DEFENDANT PHOEBUS INC
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-25-1991, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT PHOEBUS INC
